subject: [Pre-read] MY & SG CB Monthly Update - Mar 2026

content.answer:
Hi Ian, Jianghong, all,

Please find attached MY & SG CB monthly slides for our discussion tomorrow.

Let me know for any questions.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

thanks

in general we need to track cb+cnls tts sob mom evolution, yoy growth
tightly

slide 10 - cb adg% negative mom despite cny in feb ? and yet rr 101%? and
ls adg negative mom and rr 111%? target setting is weird..
slide 11 - what happened to ams sku ado coverage? mom -9.4%? even when feb
is cny month?
slide 16 - this is quite clear- seller ads coverage/overall ads
investment/take rate increased, but do we have a sense of why % of skus on
ads remain low post cny
slide 25 - for sg theres 106 sellers that we need against tts and only 2
acquired so far? by when do we plan to close this gap? does the cn side
have the local aggressive package that we offer to local to close these
gaps? what is the sob of the 2 so far? once we have these sellers we should
also track and grow the sob, instead of stopping at the acquisition?
how does the 281 here tally with the 38 in slide 65 and the 48 in slide 66?
slide 27 - what happened to mar sku count mom? especially those from MY WH?
are the numbers correct?
slide 34 - how can the ado difference be 160x? (247k vs 1.5k)
slide 38-45 - what buyer promise do we show buyer? are we moving away from
5dd to dynamic edt? whats the before/after ux that we are proposing here?
slide 48 - sg mtd acquired 8 and projected 16 sellers acquired with so few
days left? sg blckstock whats the target and timeline to get to 20%? is it
still selling but just overinbounded and just need time or is it not moving
and requries drastic actions to intervene before it becomes worse?
slide 63 - what are the reasons seller reject


--

*Chua Kel Jin*

Mobile: +65 8511 5071

Address: 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265

overall still quite cluttered, on top of improving fundamentals, lets make
sure we are focused on the key priorities which are
- cb+cnls take rate increase with manageable impact on YoY topline growth
- cb+cnls sob against tts and counter tts on the supply side (missing
sellers and ls supply and 3pf sellers)
- cb+cnls fbs%/lff% growth by seller education about fbs uplift coupled
with acquisition incentives and efforts to improve seller experience
- mysg sku and sku efficiency growth (direct, bwt, ux) and infrastructure
build (jh wh)


--

*Chua Kel Jin*

Mobile: +65 8511 5071

Address: 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 13 -16

   - What was the expected TR for SG and MY for compulsory ads program
   - What is the TR that we are seeing?
- How does the utilization rate look like right now?

Do we break down vs
   different type of sellers to better understand who is spending/not spending?

- For those who are not spending, what are our plans to get them
   spending?

Slide 25

   - For #1 and #2, do we have monthly targets?
- For MY, LFF penetration is now below TT, do we know why?

Slide 27

   - Contribution here has been quite stagnant for awhile?

Slide 47

   - Do these targets make sense if we are behind TT in terms of LFF
   penetration?

*Jason YU*

Hi all,

Please find follow up actions from our discussion yesterday, let me know if
any questions.

# Topic Action Items PIC ETA
1 CN ads take rate drop Deep dive root cause on ads take rate drop MoM for
SGCB, include CN ads team in analysis and discussion. Junnie 7 Apr
2 Ads increase potential segments Sync with CN Ads team on segment to focus
for ads take rate improvement and actions to take. Include KR view and sync
with KR Ads team on actions needed. Junnie 7 Apr
3 Ads SKU% dive Get back on root causes for SKU ads coverage% falling MoM
Junnie 8 Apr
4 MYSG delivery milestones Work with SG Product to get wireframe of the
before and after of UX buyer views of MYSG delivery milestone updates Yiji 10
Apr
5 TTS seller info Run test buy in parallel to help CN identify seller
contacts of our key TTS hitlist Junnie 17 Apr
6 Fengshui seller fan base Test mechanics to capture fan base of fengshui
seller from TTS to SHP, discuss with CN on potential channels to outreach
seller fanbase via fan communities Chloe 10 Apr
7 Dynamic EDT rollout Sycn with CN SLS on timeline and actions needed for
moving to dynamic EDT Sian Ting 3 Apr

Best regards,
*Kaiwen Zhang*
Cross Border | Singapore, Malaysia
*Mobile* +65 9118 3449
